description: Embedded, local-first agent memory: one SQLite file per namespace, no server, no cloud.

cmd.description: Install the lean-memory package, then run its lean-memory-mcp console-script entry point (the package name and script name differ, so uvx needs --from).
cmd.name: --from

name: io.github.Wuesteon/lean-memory

environmentVariables.description: Directory for per-namespace SQLite memory files. Defaults to ~/.lean_memory when unset.
environmentVariables.name: LM_DATA_ROOT

packageArguments.description: Console script entry point that starts the stdio MCP server.

runtimeArguments.description: Install the lean-memory package, then run its lean-memory-mcp console-script entry point (the package name and script name differ, so uvx needs --from).
runtimeArguments.name: --from

title: lean-memory
